Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; builds=json.load\(sys.stdin\); b=builds[0]; print\('Build ID:', b.get\('id'\)\); print\('Status:', b.get\('status'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['public_url'], t['config']['addr']\) for t in d['tunnels']]")
Bash(find /home/expo -maxdepth 4 -type d -name "platforms" 2>/dev/null | head -3 && find /home/expo -maxdepth 4 -type d -name "build-tools" 2>/dev/null | head -3)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'clip' in k.lower\(\) or 'expo' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('mmkv version:', d.get\('version'\)\); peer=d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\); print\('peers:', peer\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('nitro version:', d.get\('version'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); plugins=d.get\('expo',{}\).get\('plugins',[]\); print\('Plugins:'\); [print\(' -', p\) for p in plugins]")
